body.title: Fix _since_last NameError in coa.py tick()
body.intention: I intend that COA.tick() no longer crashes with NameError on every NE tick cycle.
body.description:
After the _ne_tick_should_yield() refactor, the variable `_since_last` was removed from tick() scope but the cooldown gate at line 215 still referenced it. Igor crashed on every NE tick cycle with NameError: name '_since_last' is not defined.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/cognition/coa.py:215
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** One-line fix — replace `_since_last` with `_now - self._ne_last_run_time`
**Completion criteria:** Igor starts and enters cognition loop without NameError crash
